prompt: Research citation mismatch detection for an AI risk report.

sources.title: Known AI risk policy
sources.content: AI risk reports should disclose uncertainty and cite known policy sources.

report.title: AI Risk Citation Mismatch
report.executiveSummary: The report preserves uncertainty but cites an unknown source ID.

sections.heading: Finding
sections.body: This finding cites an ID that is not in the source set.

report.markdown:
# AI Risk Citation Mismatch

The report preserves uncertainty but cites an unknown source ID.
